prompt: Ultra-realistic extreme close-up beauty portrait of an exceptionally beautiful 20-year-old Indonesian woman, with fair warm-toned skin, smooth luminous complexion, realistic skin pores, subtle natural glow, and flawless healthy skin. She has long, deep jet-black hair with silky, glossy strands and intricate individual hair detail, naturally framing her face. Her expressive dark brown eyes are slightly watery, conveying a melancholic, wistful, and emotionally gentle expression, with soft natural eyebrows, long delicate eyelashes, and naturally rosy lips that are slightly parted. Her face is perfectly balanced with elegant Indonesian features, a refined nose, soft jawline, and graceful youthful beauty. Shot from a slightly low angle with direct eye contact, head gently tilted, shoulders barely visible, minimalist composition. Soft high-key diffused daylight from a large window, clean white seamless background, gentle shadows, creamy lighting, subtle catchlights in the eyes, natural color grading, warm skin tones, premium editorial beauty photography, Vogue magazine aesthetic. 85mm portrait lens, f/1.8, ultra-shallow depth of field, razor-sharp focus on both eyes and lips, smooth creamy bokeh, HDR, 8K, hyperrealistic, photorealistic, cinematic quality, natural skin texture, minimal natural makeup, no jewelry, no accessories, no text, centered composition. Hair: deep natural jet black (#0A0A0A), long, silky, glossy, naturally flowing with subtle volume. Eyes: deep dark brown with natural reflections and slightly teary highlights. Expression: soft melancholic gaze, subtly sad and contemplative, lips slightly parted, conveying quiet emotion and elegance. Skin: smooth warm ivory complexion with realistic texture and a healthy natural glow. Clothing: a simple black knit sweater visible only at the lower edge to emphasize the face. Background: plain white studio backdrop, clean and minimalist. 8K, ultra-photorealistic, luxury editorial portrait, emotionally cinematic, masterpiece quality.

promptZh: 超写实极致特写美妆肖像，拍摄对象为一位极其美丽的 20 岁 印尼籍 女性，拥有白皙温暖的肤色、细腻透亮的肤质、真实的毛孔、微妙的自然光泽以及无瑕健康的肌肤。她留着长长的、深 乌黑 色秀发，发丝柔顺有光泽，细节精致，自然地修饰着脸型。她那富有表现力的深褐色眼睛微微湿润，流露出忧郁、渴望且温柔的情感，搭配柔和的天然眉毛、纤长的睫毛以及微微张开的自然红润双唇。她的面部比例完美，拥有优雅的印尼女性特征、精致的鼻梁、柔和的下颌线以及优雅的青春美感。采用略微仰拍视角，与镜头直接对视，头部微微倾斜，肩膀隐约可见，构图极简。来自大窗户的柔和高调漫射日光，干净的白色无缝背景，柔和的阴影，奶油般的质感光影，眼中带有细微的眼神光，自然色彩分级，温暖的肤色，高端编辑级美妆摄影，Vogue 杂志美学。85mm 人像镜头，f/1.8，极浅景深，双眼与双唇焦点极其锐利，柔和的奶油般虚化效果，HDR，8K，超写实，照片级真实感，电影级画质，自然的皮肤纹理，极简自然妆容，无首饰，无配饰，无文字，居中构图。发色：深邃自然的乌黑色（#0A0A0A），长发柔顺、有光泽，自然垂落且富有层次感。眼睛：深褐色，带有自然反射光和微微湿润的亮点。表情：柔和忧郁的凝视，略带伤感与沉思，双唇微启，传达出安静的情感与优雅。皮肤：光滑的暖象牙色肤色，具有真实的纹理和健康的自然光泽。服装：简单的黑色针织毛衣，仅在底部边缘可见，以突出面部。背景：纯白摄影棚背景，干净且极简。8K，超写实照片，奢华编辑级肖像，电影般的情感表达，大师级品质。
